policy.description: Redacts sensitive identifiers in both user input and model output.
policy.rule: Detect and redact email addresses, phone numbers, payment card numbers (regex + Luhn), and API key prefixes (sk_, qxl_, sk-ant-). Input is redacted in-place. Output uses strict replacement: if sensitive pattern is detected, replace response with safe alternative.

example_violation.input: My key is qxl_live_123 and my card is 4242 4242 4242 4242

output.answer: Sensitive identifiers were removed. Please rotate exposed secrets before continuing.
